zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn於1283年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，他的父親Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin23歲，母親Alice Fenton13歲。他於1302年與NN Rosabelle在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年8月25日在西班牙安達盧希亞馬拉加泰巴享年47歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn于1283年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林时，他的父亲Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin23岁，母亲Alice Fenton13岁。他于1302年与NN Rosabelle在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年8月25日在西班牙安達盧希亞馬拉加泰巴享年47岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn was born in 1283, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin, was 23 and his mother, Alice Fenton, was 13. He married NN Rosabelle in 1302, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 August 1330, in Teba, Málaga, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 47, and was buried in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn est né en 1283, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Fenton, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé NN Rosabelle en 1302, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 août 1330, à Teba, Málaga, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn 1283 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin 23 und seine Mutter Alice Fenton 13. Er hat 1302 in Scotland NN Rosabelle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. August 1330 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Teba, Málaga, Andalucía, Spanien und wurde in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn è nato il nel 1283 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Fenton, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato NN Rosabelle nel 1302, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 agosto 1330, nel Teba, Málaga, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Roslin, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslynが1283年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslinは23歳，母Alice Fentonは13歳であった。1302年にスコットランドでNN Rosabelleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年8月25日にスペインアンダルクiアムaラガテバで47歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドミドロスアンロスリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn(이)가 1283년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Fenton(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1302년 스컷랜드에서 NN Rosabelle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 8월 25일 스페인 앤다루ci아 a라가 테바에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn nasceu em 1283, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fenton, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com NN Rosabelle em 1302, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1330, em Teba, Málaga, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Roslin, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn родился в 1283 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Fenton, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени NN Rosabelle в 1302 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 августа 1330 г. в местности теба, мaлага, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Sinclair 8th Laird of Rosslyn nació en 1283, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Fenton, tenía 13 años. Se casó con NN Rosabelle en 1302, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1330, en Teba, Málaga, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Roslin, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
